subcodes.first_line: O servant of the threshold of the Abhá Beauty, thou hast a station in the divine Paradise and the Abhá Garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه جمال ابهی در فردوس الهی و جنت ابهائی مقامی
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
